Video.summary: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.grandparentTitle: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Welcome to Artists's Academy where we are dedicated to making you a better artist. We believe everyone has an artist within, waiting to be unleashed. Our mission is to be your ultimate resource for visual art education using tutorials covering everything from fundamental techniques to advanced concepts in painting and drawing.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: First, Dave Munkittrick demonstrates a handy tip for creating easy-to-use sanding pads. Then, George Vondriska and Matt Newborg discuss how to achieve a high-gloss finish on your woodworking projects. Learn to prevent over-sanding and troubleshoot imperfections in your wood surface with their expert tips.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Achieving a High-Gloss Finish

Video.summary: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spike Carlsen joins George Vondriska in the workshop to show you how to make your own timeless, craftsman style table, inspired by Spike's uncle Bob. Spike shares a little bit about the inspiration behind his side table before demonstrating the cuts and assembly needed to bring this simple yet elegant project to life.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Uncle Bob's Craftsman Side Table

Video.summary: Create a set of stylish stools with George Vondriska's step-by-step guidance as he breaks down the construction of these attractive pieces. Learn to use your table saw to make the cuts you'll need, then see how to assemble your stool and and add decorative details for professional looking results.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Stylish Stool

Video.summary: Every occasion no matter how big or small deserves a card – and today we've got designs for everyday occasions. Today's soup includes lacy pop up cards with a graphic design, some tasty treat cards featuring a lemonade stand with Sara Naumann, and translating a layout into a card with Nancy Nally. Lots of cards and ingredients in one Scrapbook Soup.
Video.title: Cards for Everyday Occasions

Video.summary: It's fun to take and share selfie photos. Amy Tan gets selfies out of the camera and onto artful pages. Ashley Horton uses fancy frames to capture a bit of herself in her designs.Amy Tan has a tip for adding stitches to patterned paper. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer creates a fun photo series from every day activities.
Video.title: Episode 9: Me, Me, Me

Video.summary: Just step outside to find artsy inspiration in nature. Calligrapher Janet Takahashi adds floral accents to plain lettering. Metalsmith Mary Hettmansperger adds patinas to copper. Art entrepreneur Jenn Mason captures nature's beauty in mono-stenciling. Julie Fei Fan Balzer has a tip for printing designs with items from nature.
Video.title: Nature

Video.summary: Celebrate the creatures of the land and sea. Whimsical quilt artist Samarra Khaja combines colorful shapes to create cute fish faces. Karen Womack shares tips on leading a local quilt guild. Blogger and designer Violet Craft sews a regal lion using English paper piecing.
Video.title: Sewing Creatures

Video.summary: Angela’s not the only Midnight Quilter in the Walters' house! Watch as she and her teenage daughter Cloe spend some quality time together making an easy-to-piece charm quilt.
Video.title: Like a Charm

Video.summary: From cornstarch to cuticle pushers, Angela shares five ingenious hacks for using common household items for quilting.
Video.title: Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting

Image.alt: Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting
Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting
Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting

Video.summary: Angela shows you how to make half-square triangles two at a time for a dazzling quilt that's beaming with color.
Video.title: Iridescence Quilt

Video.summary: Angela's been challenged by The Crafty Gemini to make a stash-busting tote bag. So she's stepping outside her comfort zone and up to the #MidnightStashChallenge!
Video.title: Quilted Tote Bag Challenge

Video.summary: Don't you love that feeling when you use up every bit of fabric for a quilt? Tune in as Angela blazes the path to a stash-neutral quilt that leaves no scrap behind.
Video.title: Pathfinder Quilt

Video.summary: This one's a total strip show! (Well, sort of.) Angela's strip-piecing secrets can help you breeze through the blocks, sashing and border of a beautiful quilt.
Video.title: Four-Color Fruit Slices Quilt

Video.summary: Angela's back and bursting with love. In this season premiere, she uses half-square triangles to make a modern bursting star quilt while sharing her tips on how to keep a lasting relationship with a quilter.
Video.title: Modern Bursting Star Quilt

Video.summary: Angela’s not the only Midnight Quilter in the Walters' house! Watch as she and her teenage daughter Cloe spend some quality time together making an easy-to-piece charm quilt.
Video.title: Like a Charm

Video.summary: Angela is back! In addition to quilting an amazing half-square triangle quilt by Monique Dillard, she's also announcing something HUGE!
Video.title: Night Sky Quilt

Video.summary: The thing about quilting is there's always room to grow, even for the midnight quilter! This episode's all about reflecting on personal growth. Well, that and how to put a modern spin on a traditional block we all know and love.
Video.title: Star Power

Video.summary: In the final episode of the Holiday Gift-Along, your last-minute gift quilter, Angela Walters, is making a beginner-friendly criss cross quilt. This gift-able quilt project is much easier than it looks, so you still have time to make it before the holidays!
Video.title: Stash-Friendly Criss Cross Quilt

Video.summary: Learn to quilt step by step with National Quilting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.title: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV

Image.alt: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV

Video.summary: The first episode is all about the trends. Angela Wolf introduces our trendy top, perfect for every occasion, size and style – sew along with eight different lessons this season on a specific element of the top. Then it’s a trending accessory and a cross body bag with Kay Whitt. Finally meet Ebony Love for our first quilt block – stay tuned over the season for five different blocks AND five unique projects utilizing your starter block.
Video.title: Trends

Video.summary: India has its own original look, or we should say multiple looks! Whether bold jewel tones, musical metals and bells, or a more mystical element, this is a style easily recognized. Kate Richbourg demonstrates Bollywood bracelets. Then Kim O'Neill introduces us to prayer beads or malas - a traditional tool used to count the number of times a mantra is recited, or breaths while meditating.
Video.title: India

Video.summary: Stacking bracelets are today's hottest style statement. Jewelry designer Meredith Roddy creates three distinct styles of stacking bracelets to combine or to wear alone. Candie Cooper designs trendy earrings for teens and tweens in Katie's Beading Lesson.
Video.title: Make These Tonight

Video.summary: Change up your techniques and create new styles. Jewelry artist and inventor Jill MacKay changes up her style with interchangeable components embellished with crystals. Katie Hacker combines memory wire and leather bolo cord to create innovative designs in Katie's Beading Lesson.
Video.title: Switch It Up

Video.summary: Certain artists are known for pushing the envelope -- they are the innovators or mavericks of the art world. We begin today with Jackson Pollock, an abstract impressionist known for his drip painting which we'll give a try. Then Joe Rotella our own maverick creates coral from film -- a pretty interesting technique. Then Cheryl Sleboda is up next with art as wearables and paldrons created for cosplay. We finish up with Candie Cooper as she cuts up cookie tins to make earrings.
Video.title: Mavericks

Video.summary: Cozy is calling! Join the ladies in an ode to warm projects, winter stews and all things bulky.
Video.title: Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects

Image.alt: Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects
Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects
Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects

Video.summary: To swatch, or not to swatch? For Tracie and Jodi, it isn't really a question. See what makes every knitter's least favorite step so important, and learn all about swatching in the round!
Video.title: 11 Swatching Secrets Every Knitter Should Know - PLUS How to Swatch in the Round!

Image.alt: 11 Swatching Secrets Every Knitter Should Know - PLUS How to Swatch in the Round!
11 Swatching Secrets Every Knitter Should Know - PLUS How to Swatch in the Round!
11 Swatching Secrets Every Knitter Should Know - PLUS How to Swatch in the Round!

Video.summary: It's important to have fun and today's projects are fun to make and to use. Katie creates a fuzzy mustache board will tickle you. Franz and his son, Axel play with paints, pencils, crayons, colors and techniques to find new ways of expression. Jenny and Katie let their imaginations go to create colorful pencil toppers. From the Family Craft Box, add empty paper rolls and colored paper to create a reversible playscape mat.
Video.title: Just for Fun

Video.summary: Today's show is all about texture -- texture is the feel or shape of a surface or thing. It's the smoothness or roughness, or maybe how soft or hard. We will learn about texture with a Paleolithic cave painting, a fun pony corral, and a friendly but prickly hedgehog. Learn how to add texture to your drawings with ordinary things from around the house in the Art Journal segment. Last, make a furry friend with giant chenille stems.
Video.title: Texture

Video.summary: Learn to knit, step-by-step with The Knitting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.title: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV

Image.alt: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV

Video.summary: Welcome to CraftsyTV's Cook & Create, where delectable delights meet crafty creators.
Video.title: Cook & Create
